The '''Minister of State''' was a political post responsible for internal affairs in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. As a [[Senator/Legends|member]] of the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]], the titleholder headed the [[Ministry of State (New Republic)|Ministry of State]], making and implementing decisions on policies on the [[Ministry Council]].

If the Chief of State was unable to discharge their duties, the Minister of State was a possible choice to replace the Chief of State. The position continued under the the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]

[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] was the first Minister of State, under [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]. [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]], [[Q-Varx]], and [[Mokka Falanthas]] served as Ministers of State under Organa, during her subsequent tenure as Chief of State. It appears that [[Borsk Fey'lya]] never appointed one under his term, but [[Releqy A'Kla]] was Minister of State under [[Cal Omas]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Ministers of State==
*[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] ([[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]–[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]) under [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]
*[[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] ([[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]–[[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]) under [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]
*[[Mokka Falanthas]] ([[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]–[[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]) under [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]
*[[Releqy A'Kla]] ([[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] - ) under [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]]
